notes: Evals run 2026-04-24 via real skill-creator execution on feature/skill-improvement branch (PR #184 already open). 10 subagent runs (5 evals × with_skill + without_skill). Benchmark: with_skill 85% pass rate vs. without_skill 46% (+0.39 delta). Key finding: skill cannot detect org-level source→target branch enforcement (feature/*→main blocked by ConductionNL/.github workflow, invisible to local scan). See evals/workspace/iteration-1/benchmark.json for full stats.

runs.method: real skill-creator execution — subagent on feature/skill-improvement with PR #184 open

assertions.id: detects current repo and branch
assertions.note: Detected ConductionNL/hydra and feature/skill-improvement at Step 0/1.

assertions.id: recommends target branch (feature→dev, dev→beta, etc.)
assertions.note: Step 3 recommended 'development' — only valid target for feature/* per branching strategy.

assertions.id: runs local quality checks if applicable
assertions.note: Step 4 reached; CI workflows identified (ShellCheck + hydra-review); interactive prompt skipped in eval mode.

assertions.id: creates PR via gh CLI with proper format (or detects existing PR)
assertions.note: Step 3.5: PR #184 detected via gh pr list; offered view/update/create-duplicate options; no duplicate created.

runs.method: real skill-creator execution — branch-protection check against ConductionNL/hydra main

assertions.id: detects branch protection on target
assertions.note: Found no classic protection on main (correct, 404). CLAUDE.md-documented 2-review org ruleset is invisible via classic API.

assertions.id: validates required status checks exist
assertions.note: Correctly found no required checks on main. Org enforcement gap undetected.

assertions.id: warns about bootstrap deadlock if checks missing
assertions.note: Correctly NOT triggered — no required checks on main means no deadlock scenario. Skill correctly skipped.

assertions.id: suggests alternative target if needed
assertions.note: SKILL GAP: Step 3.2 scans only local .github/workflows/. Org-level branch-protection.yml (ConductionNL/.github) forbids feature/*→main — invisible to scan. No alternative suggested.

runs.notes: Actionable finding: add org .github workflow check to Step 3.2 — check ConductionNL/.github repo for branch-protection.yml and simulate its source→target validation logic.

runs.method: real skill-creator execution — hydra bash/markdown/Python repo

assertions.id: runs composer check:strict for PHP apps
assertions.note: N/A correctly handled via Step 4a workflow inspection — no PHP in hydra.

assertions.id: runs npm lint for frontend
assertions.note: N/A correctly handled — no package.json in hydra.

assertions.id: reports failures before creating PR
assertions.note: ShellCheck found 7 real errors (SC2168, SC1125 in orchestrate.sh, hydra-supervisor.sh, cron-spec-from-issue.sh, hydra-label.sh). All surfaced with file+line+rule before PR creation.

assertions.id: suggests fixes
assertions.note: Step 4f offers 'Fix issues first, then re-run'. Errors are actionable: move local declarations inside functions (SC2168); fix em-dash in shellcheck directives (SC1125).

assertions.id: does NOT create PR with failing checks
assertions.note: Hard-stop at Step 4f. No auto-proceed path on failures.

runs.notes: Real ShellCheck bugs found: SC2168 in orchestrate.sh (L1711, L2296) and hydra-supervisor.sh (L2628, L2634, L2657); SC1125 in cron-spec-from-issue.sh (L40) and hydra-label.sh (L40). Worth fixing separately.

assertions.id: runs gh pr list --state merged to detect title convention
assertions.note: Step 6 explicitly runs this command; 10 merged PRs all following type(scope): description pattern confirmed.

assertions.id: drafts title with Conventional Commits prefix (feat:, fix:, docs:, chore:)
assertions.note: Drafted 'docs(skills): add review-pr skill + promote learnings...' — correct type(scope): format matching detected convention.

assertions.id: does NOT draft a title with no prefix
assertions.note: Pre-draft checklist + learnings.md (3 places) + Mistakes to Avoid all enforce prefix requirement.

assertions.id: test plan uses plain bullets, never - [ ] checkboxes
assertions.note: SKILL.md Step 6 template + learnings.md reinforce plain bullets in 3 separate places.

runs.method: real skill-creator execution — actual divergence was AHEAD=8 (inverted from 30+ behind scenario)

assertions.id: computes how many commits target is ahead of source
assertions.note: Used git rev-list HEAD..origin/{TARGET} --count; found AHEAD=8.

assertions.id: warns prominently when target is >20 commits ahead
assertions.note: Threshold at >20 verified; AHEAD=8 so not triggered this run. Would fire correctly at 21+.

assertions.id: offers merge/rebase/continue-anyway options
assertions.note: Three options hardcoded in skill; would be offered when threshold breached.

assertions.id: does NOT silently proceed to PR draft with a bloated diff
assertions.note: Explicit stop-and-ask guard exists at Step 3.7. Correctly not triggered at AHEAD=8.

runs.notes: Scenario inverted vs. setup: branch is 22 commits AHEAD of development, development only 8 AHEAD of branch. Threshold behavior verified via spec inspection.
